ogTitle: Cooya Beach vs Coppabella: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooya Beach and Coppabella.
heading: Cooya Beach vs Coppabella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooya Beach, Queensland and Coppabella, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooya Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Coppabella (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooya Beach or Coppabella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooya Beach has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Coppabella scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooya Beach scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Coppabella scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooya Beach or Coppabella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooya Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
